name: Shrimp and Pasta Creole
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, cook shrimp in melted butter over medium-high heat for 4 minutes, stirring frequently.
2. With a slotted spoon, remove the shrimp and set aside.
3. Add cream, clam juice, green onions, brandy, orange rind, and tarragon to the skillet; stir over high heat until the sauce is thickened.
4. Stir in crawfish, shrimp, pasta, and brewed coffee; heat through.
